name: Block Deep CPI Chains
description: Block transactions with excessive CPI nesting (>4 levels) that can hide malicious behavior

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Deep CPI chain detected - potential hidden malicious behavior

name: Alert on Deep CPI Chains
description: Warn on transactions with moderately deep CPI nesting (3-4 levels)

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Deep CPI chain detected - review transaction carefully

name: Block Unknown Programs in CPIs
description: Block transactions calling unverified programs via CPI

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Unknown program detected in CPI call

metadata.note: Disabled by default - may have high false positive rate with legitimate DeFi protocols
metadata.recommendation: Enable for high-security environments or use alert action

name: Alert on Unknown Programs in CPIs
description: Warn when transaction calls unverified programs via CPI

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Unknown program called via CPI - verify program safety

name: Block High CPI Risk Score
description: Block transactions with high CPI risk scores indicating complex suspicious patterns

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: High CPI risk score detected

name: Alert on Multiple Unknown CPIs
description: Warn when transaction calls 2+ unknown programs via CPI (very suspicious)

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Multiple unknown programs in CPI chain - highly suspicious
